positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a majestic crescent moon floating among intricate, glowing bioluminescent flora and geometric constellations. The composition is central and medallion-like. Use a deep indigo, teal, and sapphire color palette, emphasizing luminous glowing edges and high contrast against a dark background. Art style should be highly detailed, ethereal, and mystical, resembling clean line art merged with engraved celestial map aesthetics. Minimal photorealism, maximum graphic impact, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: text, words, signature, watermark, logo, low detail, blurry, noise, grain, artifacts, disfigured, extra limbs, poor anatomy, poor quality, cropped
